definition.title: LHS America's Flip Freight Relay Network (Master Deck)
definition.objective: Primary narrative source for social media content. Removes guesswork. Supports long-term authority compounding. Every deck mined for core concepts, data points, definitions, positioning statements, and objection handling.
definition.target_audience: Sales prospects, strategic partners, investors, drivers considering membership, LinkedIn professional audience
definition.cadence: Evergreen. Pull 1-2 authority posts per week from this deck.

_legacy_card.description: Foundational brand deck for communicating what Line Haul Station is, the Flip Freight Relay Network model, industry pain points, and strategic positioning. Used for sales, strategy, and high-level model explanation.
_legacy_card.strategic_purpose: Primary narrative source for social media content. Removes guesswork. Supports long-term authority compounding. Every deck mined for core concepts, data points, definitions, positioning statements, and objection handling.
_legacy_card.pre_approved_angles: Authority positioning. Category-defining language. Industry pain point education. Solution framework explainer. Founder-led thought leadership. Structural innovation storytelling.
_legacy_card.repurposing: Static authority posts from slides. Carousel series (break 1 slide into 3-5 posts). Reel conversions with voiceover. LinkedIn authority threads. Explainer series (one slide per week deep dive).
_legacy_card.timeline: Evergreen. Pull 1-2 authority posts per week from this deck.
